body_html_quoted.html:
Hey Stan let me know the best time to reach you so we can talk about your Graduation August 16!

We’re excited to invite you to a special tasting experience — the perfect chance to explore our menu and find the best options for your event!

📅 Date: Sunday, August 10, 2025
📍 Venue: 199 Main St, Fitchburg, MA 01420
⏰ Time Slots: 1:30 PM

Let me know if this time slot works for you so I can reserve a spot for you.

The last tasting we had was a blast, and we can't wait to bring that same energy to our next tasting. Check out some photos taken from our last tasting!







-----
Regards,
Andre Raw
​​Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website
